messages.content: 基于先验方法的去雾效果取决于先验假设准确性，这句话帮我翻译成英文
The dehazing effect based on the prior method depends on the accuracy of prior assumptions.
depends on有什么其他的替换词吗
其他可以替换"depends on"的词汇包括：relies on, is contingent upon, is determined by, is influenced by。
The prior-based methods can directly dehaze without training. The dehazing effect of prior-based methods is influenced by the accuracy of prior assumptions.帮我按照学术期刊的风格润色一下这两句话
The prior-based methods enable direct dehazing without the need for training. The effectiveness of dehazing achieved by prior-based methods is contingent upon the accuracy of the prior assumptions.
两句话的第一个词可以不一样吗，按照这个思路改

Prior-based approaches allow for direct dehazing without the requirement for training. The efficacy of dehazing achieved through the utilization of prior-based methods is contingent upon the accuracy of the underlying prior assumptions.
帮我写个gabor变换的matlab程序
针对复信号的Gabor变换生成时频图的程序
这和短时傅里叶变换没区别啊
Gabor变换不是这样的吧
程序报错了对于此运算，数组的大小不兼容。
23行代码还是不对
你再检查三遍
gabor变换的含义
Gabor 变换是一种在时域
